ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration of the match in seconds */,
  "winner_clan_name" TEXT /* Name of the winning clan */,
  "winner_side" TEXT /* Side that won the match (T or CT) */,
  "end_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the end of the match */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., Pistol, Eco, Normal) */,
  "start_money_team1" INTEGER /* Starting money for team 1 */,
  "start_money_team2" INTEGER /* Starting money for team 2 */,
  "equipment_value_team1" INTEGER /* Equipment value for team 1 */,
  "equipment_value_team2" INTEGER /* Equipment value for team 2 */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map played */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament the match is part of */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_clan_name FOREIGN KEY ("winner_clan_name") REFERENCES clans ("clan_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "clans" (
  "clan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clan */,
  "clan_name" TEXT /* Name of the clan */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the clan */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the clan was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the clan is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the clan */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match played */,
  "clan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clan the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side played by the player (T or CT) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player was on */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total kills by the player */,
  "one_kill" INTEGER /* Number of one kill rounds */,
  "two_kill" INTEGER /* Number of two kill rounds */,
  "three_kill" INTEGER /* Number of three kill rounds */,
  "four_kill" INTEGER /* Number of four kill rounds */,
  "five_kill" INTEGER /* Number of five kill rounds */,
  "trade_kill" INTEGER /* Number of trade kills */,
  "jump_kill" INTEGER /* Number of jump kills */,
  "ADP" INTEGER /* Average damage per round */,
  "TDH" INTEGER /* Total damage health */,
  "TDA" INTEGER /* Total damage armor */,
  "bomb_exploded" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb exploded */,
  "bomb_planted" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb was planted */,
  "bomb_defused" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb was defused */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the player */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the clan */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the player (e.g., entry fragger, AWPer) */,
  "secondary_role" TEXT /* Secondary role of the player (e.g., support, lurker) */,
  "hours_played" INTEGER /* Total hours played by the player */,
  "favorite_weapon" TEXT /* Favorite weapon of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_side FOREIGN KEY ("side") REFERENCES match_events ("event_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_clan_id FOREIGN KEY ("clan_id") REFERENCES clans ("clan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the round type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round type */,
  "is_pistol_round" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the round is a pistol round */,
  "is_eco_round" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the round is an eco round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment item */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the equipment */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the equipment */,
  "effect_duration" REAL /* Duration of the equipment's effect (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round where the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kill_statistics" (
  "kill_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kill statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "kill_count" INTEGER /* Total number of kills */,
  "trade_kill_count" INTEGER /* Number of trade kills */,
  "jump_kill_count" INTEGER /* Number of jump kills */,
  "headshot_count" INTEGER /* Number of headshot kills */,
  "bodyshot_count" INTEGER /* Number of body shot kills */,
  "legshot_count" INTEGER /* Number of leg shot kills */,
  "long_range_kills" INTEGER /* Number of long-range kills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kill_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kill_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_statistics" (
  "economic_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "start_money" INTEGER /* Starting money for the round */,
  "equipment_value" INTEGER /* Value of equipment purchased */,
  "ADP" REAL /* Average damage per round */,
  "end_money" INTEGER /* Money left at the end of the round */,
  "spend_on_weapons" INTEGER /* Money spent on weapons */,
  "spend_on_armor" INTEGER /* Money spent on armor */,
  "spend_on_grenades" INTEGER /* Money spent on grenades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side played by the team (T or CT) */,
  "bomb_exploded_count" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb exploded */,
  "bomb_planted_count" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb was planted */,
  "bomb_defused_count" INTEGER /* Number of rounds where bomb was defused */,
  "total_damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the team */,
  "total_damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the team */,
  "average_kill_time" REAL /* Average time taken to get a kill */,
  "average_death_time" REAL /* Average time taken to die */,
  "total_rounds_played" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds played by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES clans ("clan_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
